nasb.text: and heal those in it who are sick, and say to them, ‘The kingdom of God has come near to you.’

esv.text: Heal the sick in it and say to them, ‘The kingdom of God has come near to you.’

cnv.text: 要醫治城中的病人，對他們宣講：‘　神的國臨近你們了。’

ccb.text: 要医治那城里的病人，告诉他们，‘上帝的国临近你们了。’

csbs.text: 你们要使那城里的病人痊愈，并且要对他们说‘神的国临近你们了。’
